gempyor.compartments¶

This module defines classes, methods, and functions necessary to establishing compartments in the model. Namely, it defines the Compartments class.

Classes

Compartments(seir_config = None, seir_config = None, compartments_config = None, compartments_file = Noone, transitions_file = None)

An object to handle compartment data for the model.

Public Methods of Compartments

.constructFromConfig(seir_config: dict, compartment_config: dict)

Called by the constructor if the compartments are not loaded from a file. It will parse the compartments and transitions from config files.

.parse_compartments(seir_config: dict, compartment_config: dict)

Parses compartment configurations and returns a pd.DataFrame of compartment names.

.parse_transitions(seir_config: dict, fake_config: bool = False)

Parses the transitions defined in config and returns a pd.DataFrame containing all transitions.

.get_comp_idx(comp_dict: dict, error_info: str = "no information")

Returns the index of a compartment given a filer.

.get_transition_array()

Constructs the transition matrix for the model. Returns a tuple containing a list of unique strings of proportion exponents and rates, an np.ndarray representing transitions and corresponding compartment indices, an np.ndarray reprsenting proportion compartment indices, and an np.ndarray containing start and end indices for proportions.

.parse_parameters(parameters: np.ndarray, parameter_names: list[str], unique_strings: list[str])

Parses provided parameters and returns them in an np.ndarray.

.get_compartments_explicitDF()

Returns a copy of the compartments information pd.DataFrame, but all columns have a 'mc_' prefix.

gempyor
